eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 9:29 AM on MAY 8, 2019 Effective until 9:44 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lyon County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Lyon, Alpine, Storey and Douglas Counties.  This is only a test. No Action is required
